code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Result<Unit, String>
  let first_line = io.read_line()
  let target = match first_line
  when Some(line)
    string.trim(line)
  when None
    ""
  end

  let body = io.read_to_end()
  let tokens = string.split_whitespace(body)

  mut count = 0
  mut i = 0
  while i < tokens.len()
    let tok = match tokens.get(i)
    when Some(t)
      t
    when None
      ""
    end
    if tok == target
      count = count + 1
    end
    i = i + 1
  end

  println("count=#{count}")
  Ok(())
end
